title: Getting Started
text: uccdf provides compact consensus clustering workflow tabular data frames. package keeps API small avoids bundled large datasets.

title: Getting Started
code: fit <- fit_uccdf(iris, candidate_k = 2:4, n_resamples = 20, seed = 42) fit #> uccdf fit #> - rows: 150 #> - active columns: 5 #> - selected_k: 2 select_k(fit) #>   k stability #> 1 2 0.9599499 #> 2 3 0.8362363 #> 3 4 0.7665610 head(augment(fit)) #>   row_id cluster confidence    ambiguity #> 1      1       1          1 3.972623e-10 #> 2      2       1          1 4.269387e-10 #> 3      3       1          1 3.782320e-10 #> 4      4       1          1 5.252342e-10 #> 5      5       1          1 3.554589e-10 #> 6      6       1          1 4.596959e-10 plot_embedding(fit, main = "iris latent embedding") plot_consensus_heatmap(fit, main = "iris consensus heatmap")

title: Getting Started
text: main outputs : selected K row-level assignments consensus-derived confidence values

title: Method Overview
text: uccdf follows four steps: validate input table infer simple schema build distance view latent view aggregate repeated clustering results across candidate K

title: Method Overview
text: package intentionally minimal. large bundled data external data downloads package examples advanced model backends

title: Method Overview
text: package appropriate lightweight exploratory clustering R package setting repository size matters.

title: iris
code: fit <- fit_uccdf(iris, candidate_k = 2:4, n_resamples = 20, seed = 7) select_k(fit) #>   k stability #> 1 2 0.9618709 #> 2 3 0.8493877 #> 3 4 0.7782389 head(augment(fit)) #>   row_id cluster confidence    ambiguity #> 1      1       1          1 4.586135e-10 #> 2      2       1          1 4.292094e-10 #> 3      3       1          1 3.401017e-10 #> 4      4       1          1 3.614224e-10 #> 5      5       1          1 5.003852e-10 #> 6      6       1          1 4.632703e-10 plot_embedding(fit, main = "iris latent embedding") plot_consensus_heatmap(fit, main = "iris consensus heatmap")

title: mtcars
code: fit <- fit_uccdf(mtcars, candidate_k = 2:4, n_resamples = 20, seed = 9) select_k(fit) #>   k stability #> 1 2 0.6907096 #> 2 3 0.6551344 #> 3 4 0.7564624 head(augment(fit)) #>                              row_id cluster confidence  ambiguity #> Mazda RX4                 Mazda RX4       1  0.6615156 0.33848443 #> Mazda RX4 Wag         Mazda RX4 Wag       1  0.7027244 0.29727564 #> Datsun 710               Datsun 710       2  0.9706535 0.02934655 #> Hornet 4 Drive       Hornet 4 Drive       3  0.8234848 0.17651515 #> Hornet Sportabout Hornet Sportabout       4  0.9553618 0.04463823 #> Valiant                     Valiant       3  0.7530109 0.24698912 plot_embedding(fit, main = "mtcars latent embedding") plot_consensus_heatmap(fit, main = "mtcars consensus heatmap")

title: Authors and Citation

title: Authors and Citation
text: Dai D (2026). uccdf: Minimal Consensus Clustering Tabular Data Frames. R package version 0.1.0, https://dai540.github.io/uccdf/.
code: @Manual{,   title = {uccdf: Minimal Consensus Clustering for Tabular Data Frames},   author = {Dai Dai},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.1.0},   url = {https://dai540.github.io/uccdf/}, }

title: uccdf
text: uccdf compact R package consensus clustering tabular data frames. package intentionally narrow. designed situations input already structured table goal obtain stable cluster assignment without introducing large dependency surface, large bundled data, complex project layout. repository rebuilt around four practical goals: keep package source small keep code readable keep generated site simple keep example footprint limited built-datasets

title: uccdf
text: workflow : validate data.frame infer coarse schema build two clustering views fit repeated clustering runs aggregate consensus matrices choose supported K return row-level assignments confidence summaries implementation minimal design. provides single compact workflow small medium tabular analyses, broad clustering framework.

title: uccdf
text: validate_input() infer_schema() build_views() fit_uccdf() select_k() augment() report() plot_embedding() plot_consensus_heatmap() simulate_mixed_data()

title: uccdf
text: Install GitHub: :

title: uccdf
code: library(uccdf)  fit <- fit_uccdf(   iris,   candidate_k = 2:4,   n_resamples = 20,   seed = 42 )  fit select_k(fit) head(augment(fit)) plot_embedding(fit) plot_consensus_heatmap(fit)

title: uccdf
text: package deliberately limits scope. Input data.frame matrix-like object. Column types inferred coarsely continuous, binary, nominal, ordinal, excluded. mixed-distance view low-dimensional latent view Clustering aggregated across small learner set. package attempt support text, images, graphs, large external omics downloads, highly specialized clustering backends.

title: uccdf
text: fitted object stores: validated input inferred schema latent distance views consensus matrices K selection table row-level cluster assignments confidence empirical assignment stability score derived consensus matrix. posterior probability.

title: uccdf
text: pkgdown site organized four sections: Getting Started Guides Tutorials Reference tutorials use datasets available base R recommended packages repository remains lightweight. minimal sphinx/ source tree also included environments prefer plain static documentation build four sections.

title: uccdf
text: repository intentionally minimal: R/ contains package source man/ contains generated Rd files tests/ contains testthat tests vignettes/ contains pkgdown articles docs/ contains built pkgdown site .github/workflows/ contains CI site publishing workflows Removed purpose: bundled large datasets temporary generation directories local build artifacts unused helper scripts

title: uccdf
text: Typical local verification: shell: Generated .tar.gz files *.Rcheck/ directories committed.
code: roxygen2::roxygenise(".") pkgdown::build_site(".") R CMD build . R CMD check --no-manual uccdf_0.1.0.tar.gz

title: Fit Consensus Clustering — fit_uccdf
code: fit_uccdf(   data,   id_column = NULL,   candidate_k = 2:4,   n_resamples = 20L,   row_fraction = 0.8,   col_fraction = 0.8,   latent_dims = 4L,   seed = 123 )

title: Fit Consensus Clustering — fit_uccdf
text: data data frame matrix-like object. id_column Optional identifier column name. candidate_k Candidate cluster counts. n_resamples Number resamples. row_fraction Fraction rows per resample. col_fraction Fraction active columns per resample. latent_dims Number latent dimensions. seed Random seed.

title: uccdf 0.1.0
text: Rebuilt minimal R package reduced source layout. Removed bundled large example data auxiliary generation directories. Simplified documentation pkgdown structure.
